description: This is a sample input for the categorization model.

notes.description_field: Raw merchant transaction text. Tokenized by DistilBERT (max_length=48) or TF-IDF (max_features=10000) depending on model variant.
notes.amount_field: Transaction amount in original currency. Log-transformed (log1p) before feeding to the model as an auxiliary feature.
notes.currency_field: ISO 4217 currency code. Mapped to a learned 20-dim embedding via vocabulary of top 20 currencies.
notes.country_field: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code. Mapped to a learned 50-dim embedding via vocabulary of top 50 countries.
notes.timestamp_field: Not directly used by the model, but used upstream in the data pipeline for feature engineering and chronological splitting.
